home.logo.description: Automation Exercise website logo image in the top-left of the home page header

home.nav_home.description: Home navigation link in the main top header nav bar

home.nav_products.description: Products navigation link in the main top header nav bar

home.nav_cart.description: Cart navigation link in the main top header nav bar

home.nav_signup_login.description: Signup / Login navigation link in the main top header nav bar that routes to /login

home.nav_contact.description: Contact us navigation link in the main top header nav bar

home.logged_in_label.description: Logged in as <user> label that appears in the header once a user is authenticated

login.login_heading.description: Heading 'Login to your account' above the login form on /login

login.login_email.description: Email Address text input inside the Login to your account form on /login

login.login_password.description: Password input inside the Login to your account form on /login

login.login_button.description: Login submit button inside the Login to your account form on /login

login.login_error.description: Red inline error 'Your email or password is incorrect!' shown on failed login
login.login_error.primary: p:has-text("Your email or password is incorrect!")

login.signup_heading.description: Heading 'New User Signup!' above the signup form on /login

login.signup_name.description: Name text input inside the New User Signup form on /login

login.signup_email.description: Email Address input inside the New User Signup form on /login

login.signup_button.description: Signup submit button inside the New User Signup form on /login

login.signup_email_exists_error.description: Inline error 'Email Address already exist!' shown when signing up with a taken email
